resources.title: Project Atlantis
resources.evidence_quote: Today, we got to talk with one of the maintainers of Project Atlantis, a Terraform pull request automation system.

resources.title: Atlantis OpenTofu support blog post
resources.evidence_quote: So that there's a blog post in our site about that. And then we release Open Tofu official support.

resources.title: Atlantis Helm chart
resources.evidence_quote: And we do offer a help chart for people that are running Kubernetes so that they can install the help chart.
